title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has warned that Claude is increasingly automating code writing, review, debugging, and experimentation tasks within AI development itself. This represents early-stage AI self-improvement where AI systems participate in the creation of better AI systems, raising governance concerns shared by OpenAI.
